title: Mpox-Clade-Ib-Clock: Reproducibility code for a two-detector protocol isolating inter-clade recombination in mpox genomic surveillance
description: Reproducibility code and result artefacts for the pre-registered (OSF Pre-Registration CASR2, doi:10.17605/OSF.IO/CASR2) recombination-surveillance analysis of mpox clade Ib at the 2026-05-22 public-corpus freeze. The analysis quantifies how a two-detector protocol (3SEQ population scan plus PhiPack confirmation) separates one genuine inter-clade Ib/IIb recombinant from intra-clade Ib, APOBEC3-homoplasy and partial-genome signal. The repository contains the Python scripts, Snakemake workflow, environment specifications, four §6.4 deviation amendments, the APOBEC3-column masking experiment and parent-panel drop-control artefacts, the partial-genome injection test, the saturation-aware APOBEC3-clock calibration (now a short methods note), and the two main-text figures plus seven supplementary tables. See README.md for the data sources, requirements, and reproduction steps.

creators.name: Farquhar, Hayden
creators.affiliation: Independent Researcher, Finley, New South Wales, Australia
